description_long: This is a damaged, headless and armless female torso doll, made from a pale, flesh-toned plastic material. The surface is marred with scratches, scuffs, and dark stains, indicating significant wear and exposure to the elements. The left shoulder and neck are broken, revealing hollow interiors and jagged edges, while the right breast and side show additional chipping and discoloration. The back is similarly worn, with visible creases and a slightly concave shape, and the base is uneven and torn. The overall form is anatomically stylized, with defined breasts, waist, and hips, but the missing limbs and head give it a fragmented, abandoned appearance. This object could plausibly be found discarded in an urban alley, park, or vacant lot.
description: A damaged, headless and armless female torso doll made of pale, worn plastic with visible cracks, stains, and hollow interior. The surface is scratched and chipped, giving it an abandoned, weathered look.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the broken left shoulder, missing head, and pronounced breast contours with visible stains and cracks.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the concave back, worn surface, and jagged edges at the neck and base.
description_view_2: Front-right view emphasizing the hollow left shoulder socket, chipped right side, and more pronounced surface damage.
description_view_3: Direct frontal view displaying the defined chest, missing arms and head, and various stains and scratches on the torso.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the torso is nude and unadorned.
attribute_pose: Torso upright with both arms and head missing; chest and hips are forward-facing, with a slight twist in the waist.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features present due to missing head.
attribute_hair_style: No hair present due to missing head.
